anchor: Saturday — contrarian take on no-code agent builders

posts.body_preview: No-code agent builders are the new WordPress page builders. Cheap to start. Impossible to maintain. Your clients will call you in 9 months asking why their bot is lying to customers.
Three months into shipping UpliftAI to real customers. What I'd tell past-me: charge more, scope less, and get paid before you build. The stack is the easy part.
Every AI agency pitch deck in 2026 opens with the same slide: 'we save you 40% on operations.' Nobody saves 40%. You save 8%, ship faster, and sleep better. Sell that.
No-code agent builders are 2026's WordPress page builders. Cheap to start, impossible to maintain. 45-second explainer →
Three months into UpliftAI. What I'd tell past-me: charge more, scope less, get paid before you build. 60-second reel with the receipts.
